scripts.build: npx pnpm@9 --dir TLIS_repo install && npx pnpm@9 --dir TLIS_repo --filter @workspace/api-server --filter @workspace/tiktok-luxury run build && vite build && mkdir -p dist/workspace && cp dist/index.html dist/workspace/index.html && rm dist/index.html && cp -r TLIS_repo/artifacts/tiktok-luxury/dist/public/* dist/ && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --sourcemap --outfile=dist/server.cjs
